emails.body:
IEEE Spectrum Daily Digest — 29 September 2026

Top stories today:

• Quantum Computing: IBM unveils 1,121-qubit Condor processor, claims path to error-corrected systems by 2029
• Power Grid: DOE awards $3.4B for grid resilience projects across 44 states
• AI Hardware: Cerebras files for IPO, reveals WSE-3 cluster training 70B-parameter models in days
• Robotics: Boston Dynamics' Atlas demonstrates full autonomous construction-site tasks
• Spectrum: FCC opens 6 GHz band for very low power devices, enabling AR/VR headsets

Read more: spectrum.ieee.org/daily

---
IEEE Spectrum | 445 Hoes Lane, Piscataway, NJ 08854
Unsubscribe: newsletters.ieee.org/preferences

IEEE Spectrum Daily Digest — 1 October 2026

Top stories today:

• Semiconductors: TSMC Arizona fab begins 4nm trial production, yield rates "encouraging"
• Battery Tech: Solid-state cells from QuantumScape pass 1,000-cycle automotive qualification
• Space: Starship IFT-5 sticks tower catch; FAA closes mishap investigation
• Cybersecurity: NIST finalizes post-quantum crypto standards (ML-KEM, ML-DSA, SLH-DSA)
• Biomedical: Neuralink reports first human BCI cursor control at 8 bits/sec

Read more: spectrum.ieee.org/daily

---
